data.name: Cafe Maid - Hentai Edition
data.detailed_description:
Cafe Maid is part of the same idler franchise as our other game, Kinky Cosplay Heroes, but this time the story unfolds in a charming café setting. We believe both new players and fans of the other game will enjoy the mix of familiar mechanics and a wealth of fresh content

Overview

In Cafe Maid serve your guests' needs in your own café. Your harem of cute anime maid girls earns you money even while you are shaving or watching your favorite movies, and when you come back, you can spend all that to make your cafe the biggest success around the globe. The game scales almost infinitely.

Manage the Cafe

Hire the cutest maids, selecting from a large variety, starting with your tsundere stepsister: a punk singer, an aspiring pie cook, a classic twintailed maid, a seductive fox girl and more. Set up to meet the guests' needs, whether it's preparing and serving cakes, coffees, cocktails, or even more mischievous requests. Click the girls to collect money and upgrade their services so that they can entertain the guests even more and earn more money. After a while, you will be able to automate this process, freeing up your hands to do something else... for example, hire new maids to do new functions in the cafe or help them provide special services to the customers in one of the back rooms.

Idler game-play

And the best part is, Cafe Maid can even play itself! Get your businesses booming, upgrade the maids to keep making the money while you’re gone. Money keeps accumulating while you’re offline, just waiting for you to come back and spend! It's easy!

Upgrade Your Company

When your current cafe is successful enough, you can sell it to another investor and receive a big profit in return that you can spend further developing your brand. Your decisions determine how much more efficiently your next company will earn money.
Rules, Tasks and Achievements

Complete milestones while managing your cafe and if you are looking for other challenges, accomplish the tasks and achievements that you get from the cuties.

Harem of 9 Maids

When you want to get intimate with one of the maids, ask them out and give them presents or fulfill tasks for them.

30+ Sex Scenes

Those who really deserve it get all the sweaty, naughty fun from their favorite maids.

data.short_description: Start your own sexy idle cafe, filling your staff with cute anime girls... and have fun with them in various sex scenes, all the while your business grows even while you are away.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: INTEL® Pentium Dual Core G3250
  • 顯示卡: Any with dx11 support
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX9c compliant
